title: Operationalize generative AI applications (GenAIOps)
summary: Learn the full GenAIOps lifecycle for generative AI applications, from planning and prompt management to evaluation, automated testing, monitoring, and tracing in production.

sections.title: Operationalize generative AI applications (GenAIOps)
sections.summary: Learn the full GenAIOps lifecycle for generative AI applications, from planning and prompt management to evaluation, automated testing, monitoring, and tracing in production.

lessons.title: Plan and prepare a GenAIOps solution
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to plan and prepare a GenAIOps solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-prepare-genaiops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and prepare a GenAIOps solution

lessons.title: Manage prompts for agents in Microsoft Foundry with GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage prompts for agents in Microsoft Foundry using GitHub version control and collaboration features.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/prompt-versioning-genaiops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage prompts for agents in Microsoft Foundry with GitHub

lessons.title: Evaluate and optimize AI agents through structured experiments
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to evaluate and optimize AI agents systematically through structured experiments that measure quality, cost, and performance. Design evaluation metrics, apply Git-based workflows, create consistent scoring rubrics, and make evidence-based optimization decisions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/evaluate-optimize-agents/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Evaluate and optimize AI agents through structured experiments

lessons.title: Automate AI evaluations with Microsoft Foundry and GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement automated evaluations for AI agents using Microsoft Foundry evaluators and GitHub Actions workflows.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/automated-evaluation-genaiops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Automate AI evaluations with Microsoft Foundry and GitHub Actions

lessons.title: Monitor your generative AI application
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to monitor the performance of your generative AI application using Microsoft Foundry. This module teaches you to track key metrics like latency and token usage to make informed, cost-effective deployment decisions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-generative-ai-app/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Analyze and debug your generative AI app with tracing
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement tracing in your generative AI applications using Microsoft Foundry and OpenTelemetry. This module teaches you to capture detailed execution flows, debug complex workflows, and understand application behavior for better reliability and optimization.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tracing-generative-ai-app/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Analyze and debug your generative AI app with tracing

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Operationalize generative AI applications (GenAIOps)
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Operationalize generative AI applications (GenAIOps)**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
